description: Bold monochrome manga line-art portrait style

model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: alvdansen/BandW-Manga. Research use only. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 1.0 = maximum style strength. Try 0.8 for softer lines.

generation._hint: 35 steps produces cleaner outlines. 30 is acceptable. | CFG 7 keeps the stark line quality. Higher values can cause blown-out blacks. | SDXL native 1024×1024. Portrait orientation (768×1024) also works well.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates striking black-and-white manga illustrations — bold ink lines, high contrast, and expressive minimalist portrayals typical of Japanese graphic novels.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word needed. Short, simple subject prompts work best per model card examples. Examples: 'a boy in a sailor suit frowning', 'a toad', 'a girl with a flower crown', 'an old warrior with a scar'.

Negative prompt: Recommended: 'color, colorful, grey, grayscale' to enforce strict B&W output.
